message:
feat(connectors): wire ConnectorRuntime lifecycle into all connector structs

Add Option<ConnectorRuntime> field to every connector struct so the
runtime is created during configure() and gracefully shut down during
shutdown(). The shutdown path now calls client.shutdown() followed by
runtime.shutdown() to ensure all in-flight request contexts are
cancelled before the connector is torn down.

Includes minor rustfmt reformatting of long method chains in several
connector.rs files (stripe, github, etc.).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
